bracu_official.title: BRAC University Law Graduate Awarded Prestigious Joint Doctoral Scholarship Between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney
bracu_official.summary: A BRAC University law graduate has been awarded a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship, a collaboration between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law alumni association’s new executive committee takes charge for 2026–2028 term
bracu_official.summary: The BRAC University law alumni association's new executive committee has commenced its term, serving from 2026 to 2028.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University hosts workshops on case solving, strategic decision-making and AI
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University recently organized workshops focusing on essential skills such as case solving, strategic decision-making, and the application of artificial intelligence.

bracu_official.title: Last Date of Payment for Summer 2026
bracu_official.summary: An announcement has been made regarding the last date for fee payments for the upcoming Summer 2026 semester.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2
bracu_official.summary: An official notice has been issued for the award identified as B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1
bracu_official.summary: An official notice has been issued for the award identified as B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1.

bracu_official.title: Recruitment Notice
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has released a notice detailing current recruitment opportunities available.

bracu_official.title: LLB Final Exam Schedule: Spring 2026
bracu_official.summary: The final examination schedule for the LLB program for the Spring 2026 semester has been published.
